stories.title: Document codebase with AGENTS.md
stories.description: Create AGENTS.md at project root documenting architecture, real vs mock status, API map, and agent guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md exists at project root
AGENTS.md lists all real implementations with file paths
AGENTS.md lists all mock/stub items and their replacement status
AGENTS.md documents API routes with method, path, auth requirement
AGENTS.md documents tech stack and service ports

stories.title: Bookmarks store: stop initializing with mock data
stories.description: store/bookmarks-store.ts initializes bookmarks with mockBookmarks (16 hardcoded items). On empty DB, show empty state — not fake bookmarks.
acceptanceCriteria: bookmarks-store.ts initializes bookmarks as [] (empty array), not mockBookmarks
fetchBookmarks() sets bookmarks from API when user is authenticated
When API returns empty array and user IS authenticated, bookmarks remain []
isLoading starts as true on first render, false after fetchBookmarks completes
Mock data is not imported for initialization

stories.title: Sidebar: replace mock collections with real categories from API
stories.description: sidebar.tsx imports `collections` from mock-data. Collections section should show real user categories from /api/categories.
acceptanceCriteria: sidebar.tsx no longer imports `collections` from mock-data/bookmarks
Sidebar fetches categories from /api/categories on mount
Each category renders with its name and document count
Clicking a category filters the bookmarks by that category
Empty state shows 'No categories yet' when API returns empty
Loading state shown while categories are being fetched

stories.title: Sidebar: replace mock tags with real tags from documents
stories.description: sidebar.tsx imports `tags` from mock-data. Tags should be derived from actual document metadata in the DB.
acceptanceCriteria: sidebar.tsx no longer imports `tags` from mock-data/bookmarks
Tags are fetched from /api/documents endpoint and derived from document metadata
Tag counts reflect real document counts
Tag filtering still works — clicking tag filters bookmarks
Empty tags section hidden or shows empty state when no tags exist

stories.title: StatsCards: use real counts from DB instead of mock array lengths
stories.description: stats-cards.tsx uses mock collections.length and tags.length for Collections and Tags Used stats.
acceptanceCriteria: stats-cards.tsx no longer imports from mock-data/bookmarks
Collections count comes from real categories fetched from API
Tags Used count comes from real tags in bookmarks store
Total Bookmarks and Favorites counts remain correct (from bookmarks store)

stories.title: Content component: remove mock-data imports
stories.description: content.tsx imports `collections` and `tags` from mock-data for display. Should use real data.
acceptanceCriteria: content.tsx no longer imports from mock-data/bookmarks
currentCollection name displayed comes from real categories or store state
activeTagsData comes from real tags in bookmarks store
Filter chips still work correctly

stories.title: Sidebar: connect user avatar to real auth session
stories.description: Sidebar shows hardcoded /ln.png avatar and LN initials. Should use real logged-in user info from better-auth.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar uses useSession() from auth-client to get current user
Avatar fallback shows real user initials (first 2 chars of name/email)
Hardcoded /ln.png and LN are replaced with dynamic values
Works correctly when session is loading or user is null

stories.title: Sidebar: remove hardcoded workspace entries
stories.description: Workspace dropdown has hardcoded 'Personal' and 'Work' entries that are not real workspaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Hardcoded 'Personal' and 'Work' workspace items removed
Workspace dropdown shows only the current user's workspace (app name)
Create Workspace item remains as future placeholder
Account Settings and Workspace Settings items remain

stories.title: Add Bookmark button: wire to URL/text ingest endpoint
stories.description: Header has an 'Add Bookmark' button with no functionality. Should open a modal to ingest a URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Add Bookmark opens a modal/dialog
Modal has a URL input field
Submitting calls POST /api/ingest/url with the provided URL
Shows loading state during ingest
On success: closes modal, refreshes bookmarks list
On error: shows error message in modal

stories.title: Build passes without TypeScript errors
stories.description: After all changes, the Next.js build (or tsc --noEmit) must pass without errors.
acceptanceCriteria: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 0
No import errors from removed mock-data usage
All new components have correct TypeScript types
